ogTitle: Corindi Beach vs Corlette: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Corindi Beach and Corlette.
heading: Corindi Beach vs Corlette — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Corindi Beach, New South Wales and Corlette, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Corlette has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Corindi Beach (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Corindi Beach or Corlette safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Corindi Beach has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Corlette scores 20/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Corindi Beach scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Corlette scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Corindi Beach or Corlette?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Corlette has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
